def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    short_ma = df['close'].rolling(window=params['short_ma_window']).mean()
    long_ma = df['close'].rolling(window=params['long_ma_window']).mean()
    resistance = df['high'].rolling(window=params['resistance_window']).max()
    support = df['low'].rolling(window=params['support_window']).min()
    signals = np.where((short_ma > long_ma) & (df['close'] > resistance), 1,
                       np.where((short_ma < long_ma) & (df['close'] < support), -1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index, dtype='int')
rationale: EUR/GBP exhibits support and resistance levels confirmed by moving average crossovers, indicating potential trend reversals.
